hero.label: Enterprise Software Products
hero.heading: Intelligent Products That Transform Operations
hero.description: From ERP platforms to AI voice agents and CRM systems, our products automate the work behind your business, cut operating cost, and deploy inside your stack in days and not quarters.

showcase.label: Our Products
showcase.description: Seven products, one secure platform. Switch between them to see what each does and how fast it ships.

products.title: Cortex Voiz: The AI Phone Assistant
products.subtitle: Production-quality AI voice agents for inbound and outbound calls without building telephony infrastructure from scratch.
products.description: Manual phone handling is costly and hard to scale. Create, configure, and manage intelligent voice agents from one dashboard — whether you run a clinic, a bank, or a contact centre.
products.demoText: Watch the 2-min demo — no form needed

features.title: Intelligent Inbound & Outbound Calling
features.subtitle: Automate your sales outreach and customer support.

features.title: Actionable Insights & Summaries
features.subtitle: Every completed phone call automatically generates a full searchable transcript

features.title: Knowledge-Driven Responses (RAG)
features.subtitle: Ground your AI's knowledge in your actual business data.

features.title: Multilingual Capabilities
features.subtitle: Serve a global customer base effortlessly.

features.title: Risk-Free Browser Live Testing
features.subtitle: Perfect your agent's behavior before going live.

features.title: Seamless CRM & API Integration
features.subtitle: A robust REST API allowing seamless integration with your existing external applications and CRMs

performance.heading: Built for Scale and Performance
performance.description: Cortex Voiz is engineered for ultra-low latency voice interactions. It integrates directly with industry-leading telephony providers like Twilio and Plivo and uses a high-performance Python (FastAPI) orchestration layer to stream real-time audio directly to the Google Gemini Live WebSocket API

platform.label: Built for Scale and Performance
platform.heading: One Secure Platform Behind Every Product
platform.description: Every CortexCraft product runs on the same hardened platform — low-latency, integration-ready, and audit-friendly from day one, so it drops into your environment instead of fighting it.

features.title: Latency
features.description: Sub-second turn-taking on live calls via a streaming WebSocket pipeline.

features.title: Integrations
features.description: Native connectors and a clean REST API into your CRMs, ERPs, and data stores.

features.title: Orchestration
features.description: A FastAPI layer streaming audio to real-time speech and reasoning models.

features.title: Security
features.description: Encrypted in transit and at rest, with role-based access and full call audit logs.

demo.label: Test It Yourself
demo.heading: Talk To Cortex Voiz & Test Your Own Scenario
demo.description: Pick a use case and our AI agent will call you and run it live, then answer anything you want to ask. The fastest way to judge it is to hear it.
demo.note: We'll call within ~30 seconds. The call takes about 2 minutes.

form.agreementText: I agree to receive a one-time automated call from CortexCraft for this demo, and to the privacy policy.

testimonial.quote: Cortex Voiz answered 30,000 patient calls in the first month and booked 41% of them without a single human picking up.
testimonial.author: Surya
testimonial.statLabel: of inbound appointments booked fully autonomously, day one.

ctaSection.heading: Ready to see it in your workflow?
ctaSection.description: Tell us the operation you want to automate and we'll show you the product that fits — running on your scenario.
